task_completion.description: Create an IFC4 project with a name containing 'Hillcrest'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the BlenderBIM project setup panel or the Outliner showing the root project node with a name containing 'Hillcrest' and the schema set to IFC4.

task_completion.description: Establish a spatial hierarchy with Site, Building, and two Building Storeys (Ground Floor at 0.0m, First Floor at 3.0m)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the BlenderBIM Spatial Manager or Outliner. You should see a hierarchy containing an IfcSite, IfcBuilding, and two IfcBuildingStorey elements (typically named Ground Floor and First Floor). Elevation values might be visible in the Spatial Manager or object properties.

task_completion.description: Model a staircase assembly containing an 'IfcStair' element
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner or Object Properties panel for an object explicitly classified as 'IfcStair'. It should be visible in the 3D viewport connecting the two floors.

task_completion.description: Include at least one 'IfcStairFlight' element in the staircase assembly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner or Object Properties panel for an object explicitly classified as 'IfcStairFlight', typically nested under or associated with the IfcStair.

task_completion.description: Include at least one 'IfcRailing' element in the staircase assembly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner or Object Properties panel for an object explicitly classified as 'IfcRailing', typically placed alongside the stair flight.
Look at the Blender window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog box, or a terminal window confirming the file has been saved to the exact path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/hillcrest_stairs.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/BlenderBIM GUI to create the project and elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, Outliner, and BlenderBIM add-on panels rather than just terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the IFC file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) open with raw STEP/IFC code being manually typed or pasted.

integrity.description: The agent built the model incrementally rather than loading a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show the progression from an empty project to the spatial hierarchy, and then the addition of the stairs and railings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project name must contain 'Hillcrest'. The spatial hierarchy must contain exactly 2 storeys (Ground Floor and First Floor, with the upper floor at an elevation of at least 2.5m, specifically 3.0m as per instructions). The final output must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/hillcrest_stairs.ifc'. The model must contain elements with the exact IFC classifications: 'IfcStair', 'IfcStairFlight', and 'IfcRailing'.
